title: KeyboardAndMouseOverlay
description: Performance-first Keystrokes mod for Fabric 1.20.1. Cross-platform support.
body:
KAMO - Keyboard & Mouse Overlay (PvP Edition)
KAMO (Keyboard And Mouse Overlay) is a high-performance, lightweight, and highly customizable HUD mod designed specifically for the Minecraft PvP community. Built on the Fabric API for version 1.20.1, KAMO provides a clean, aesthetic, and lag-free visualization of your keystrokes and mouse movements directly on your screen.
latformavport
